name: Pastor John Smith
role: Senior Pastor, First Baptist Church of Example City
incident: Pastor Smith preached against gambling from the pulpit for 15 years while secretly embezzling 200,000 dollars from the church's building fund and losing it at a casino in Shreveport, Louisiana. He was charged with wire fraud and breach of fiduciary duty in January 2026.

name: Reverend Jane Doe
role: Lead Pastor, Prosperity Gospel Ministries International
incident: Reverend Doe raised 4 million dollars in 2025 for a 'clean water mission' in rural Kenya. An IRS audit in February 2026 revealed the funds were used to renovate her personal residence in Scottsdale, Arizona and purchase a Porsche Cayenne. She had preached tithing as a divine obligation at least 28 times in the preceding 12 months.
